section1.title: Paper Trading Educational Platform
section1.body: This service is an educational paper-trading simulator using virtual funds. No real money transactions or actual financial loss occurs.

section2.title: 18+ Only
section2.body: This service is available only to users aged 18 and above. Minors are strictly prohibited from signing up or using this platform.

section3.title: Not Gambling
section3.body: This service is not gambling, betting, or gambling games. It is an educational tool to learn trading skills using virtual funds.

section4.title: No Refunds on Virtual Money
section4.body: Purchased game credits (virtual funds) are non-refundable. Some paid products (e.g., Premium Membership) may have separate refund policies.

section5.title: Educational Content Only
section5.body: All charts, analyses, and advice provided are for educational purposes only. They are not financial advice or investment recommendations.

section6.title: Terms Modification
section6.body: We may modify these terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page. Continued use constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

section1.title: Data Collection
section1.body: We collect Telegram user ID, preferred language, trading history, and portfolio data.

section2.title: Data Processing & Delegation
section2.body: User data is processed through Supabase (database), Sentry (error tracking), and PostHog (analytics).

section3.title: Data Security
section3.body: All sensitive information is encrypted and protected through regular security audits.

section4.title: Global Privacy Compliance
section4.body: We comply with GDPR (Europe), PIPA (Korea), CCPA (California), and other global data protection regulations.

section5.title: User Rights
section5.body: Users may request access, modification, or deletion of their data at any time. Contact @askbit_support for details.

section6.title: Cookies & Tracking
section6.body: We use cookies and tracking technologies to improve user experience. You can disable them anytime in browser settings.

section1.title: Game Credit Recharge Policy
section1.body: Game credit recharges ($1K, $5K, $10K) are one-time purchases and are non-refundable.

section2.title: Premium Membership Refund Policy
section2.body: Monthly Premium Membership ($39.99) is refundable within 7 days of purchase if unused.

section3.title: No Refunds After Use
section3.body: Once membership is used (accessing analytics, viewing charts), refunds are not available.

section4.title: Refund Request Process
section4.body: To request a refund, contact @askbit_support with your receipt. We will process it within 3-5 business days.

section5.title: Non-Refundable Items
section5.body: Game credits are virtual funds and non-refundable. Premium membership is also non-refundable after use.

learn.desc: Mistakes here cost you nothing. Build intuition before risking a single real dollar.

step1.desc: Tap the button below. Telegram opens @Tradergames_bot in one second.

step3.desc: Long, short, leverage up to 125x. Climb the leaderboard, share your ROI.

cost.a: Yes. The game itself is free with $10,000 daily virtual seed. Optional Premium analytics ($39.99/month) and recharge packs are paid, but never required to play.

real.a: No. This is paper trading. All P&L is virtual USD. Nothing connects to a real exchange and no real funds change hands.

experience.a: No. Many users open their first long/short here. Mistakes here are free — that is the point.

install.q: Do I need to install anything?
install.a: No. It runs inside the Telegram app you already have. There is no separate download.

data.a: Live Binance public feed (spot + futures). The same chart professionals watch.

leverage.a: 1x to 125x, just like a real perpetual futures exchange. Liquidation is enforced — virtually.

finalCta.title: Ready to trade — risk-free?
finalCta.subtitle: $10,000 virtual seed. One tap. Inside Telegram.

footer.disclaimer: Educational paper-trading simulator. Virtual currency only. Not financial advice. Not gambling. 18+.
